telegraph.toxicsurface.title: The Air Grows Heavy
telegraph.toxicsurface.subtitle: Surface toxic in %s
telegraph.toxicsurface.chat: ⚠ The surface will turn toxic in %s — seal up while you can.
tooltip.toxicsurface.industrial_filter.u: Scrubber for toxic generators — keeps them from venting smog while it lasts.
tooltip.toxicsurface.industrial_filter.c: Generators only (not masks or suits). Clogs after ~15 min of use.
tooltip.toxicsurface.dirty_industrial_fi: Wash it: a fan blowing through water (splashing) → wet industrial filter.
tooltip.toxicsurface.wet_industrial_filt: Dry it with heat: a furnace, or a fan blowing through lava → clean filter.
tooltip.toxicsurface.toxic_residue.fuel: Burns in a Toxic Waste Generator as basic fuel.
tooltip.toxicsurface.toxic_waste_block.f: Premium fuel for a Toxic Waste Generator — burns far longer for more power.
tooltip.toxicsurface.waste_generator.fue: Burns toxic residue or waste blocks to spin a shaft (Create rotation).
tooltip.toxicsurface.sludge_generator.fu: Burns piped-in toxic sludge to spin a shaft (Create rotation).
tooltip.toxicsurface.generator.scrub: Vents toxic smog and hastens the apocalypse unless an Industrial Filter scrubs it.
jei.toxicsurface.cleanser.info: A toxic Cleanser. Powered, it projects a clean bubble over a configurable radius — toxic gas and rain are scrubbed inside it and surface sludge in range is slowly reverted, so foliage and players are safe within. It transforms no items; raise its range in the machine's screen. The Create Mechanical Cleanser does the same, driven by rotational power.
jei.toxicsurface.industrial_filter.info: A heavy-duty, reusable scrubber filter for toxic generators — crafted from 4 iron and 3 clean filters. While a clean one sits in a generator's scrubber slot the generator runs clean, venting no smog and adding no pollution. It is never accepted by a face mask or hazmat suit. After about 15 minutes of use it clogs into a Dirty Industrial Filter and must be cleaned before reuse.
jei.toxicsurface.dirty_industrial_filter: A clogged industrial filter. Clean it in two steps: first wash it with a Create encased fan blowing through water (a Splashing recipe) to make a Wet Industrial Filter, then dry it with heat. Washing also releases captured Toxic Residue about half the time.
jei.toxicsurface.wet_industrial_filter.i: A washed industrial filter, still damp. Dry it with heat to restore a clean Industrial Filter: smelt it in a furnace, or blast it (blast furnace or a Create fan blowing through lava).
jei.toxicsurface.toxic_residue.info: Solid toxic contaminant reclaimed from filters and sludge. Burns in a Toxic Waste Generator as basic fuel, compacts into a Toxic Waste Block, or can be mixed back into sludge.
jei.toxicsurface.toxic_waste_block.info: Compacted toxic waste. As generator fuel it is the premium tier — it burns far longer than loose residue and spins the generator faster for more power.
jei.toxicsurface.waste_generator.info: Burns solid toxic waste to spin a shaft as a Create rotation source. Toxic Residue is basic fuel; a Toxic Waste Block burns far longer for more power. While running it vents a toxic smog cloud and speeds the world's toxic escalation — load a clean Industrial Filter in its scrubber slot to run clean. A redstone signal halts it.
jei.toxicsurface.sludge_generator.info: Burns toxic sludge to spin a shaft as a Create rotation source. Create pumps fill its internal tank directly. While running it vents a toxic smog cloud and speeds the world's toxic escalation — load a clean Industrial Filter in its scrubber slot to run clean. A redstone signal halts it.
advancement.toxicsurface.the_air_has_tur: The surface is toxic now. Seal up, filter your air, and find a way to reclaim the world.
